title: Addis 518250 Everyday Kitchen Food Waste Compost Caddy Bin, 4.5 Litre, Dark Green
features: Ideal 4.5 litre capacity for everyday kitchen use
Can also be used as a cleaning or storage caddy
Hard wearing quality finish, Easy to wipe clean
Dimensions w 25 x d 18 x h 19 cm (10 Inch x 7 Inch x 7.5 Inch)
Made in the UK with 10 year Addis guarantee
description: Product Description Made in the UK, this new stylist kitchen food waste compost or utility caddy bin by Addis will be the perfect addition to any kitchen and household; A versatile 4.5 litre capacity for regular house use, before disposal into larger kerb side collection or garden bins. Can also be used as a cleaning or storage caddy i.e. washing tabs; The clip lock lid has a wide stay open, allowing for easy load waste disposal, complete with convenient carry handle, whilst keeping waste out of sight and odour free when closed; Finished in a choice of great bright fresh colours, easy to wipe clean and dishwasher safe; Dimensions w 25 x d 18 x h 19 cm (10 Inch x 7 Inch x 7.5 Inch); Fits Addis 100 percent compostable starch-based renewable bin liners or other similar sized bags. Addis part of the home since 1780  based in the UK, we have a proud plus 239 year old history of design, manufacture and supply of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today, as it has for previous generations, for value, quality and innovation. Safety Warning Do not use for hazardous waste. Use only for food waste.
